snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    api_version="YOUR_API_VERSION",
)
client.list_items()
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    api_version="YOUR_API_VERSION",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.list_items()


asyncio.run(main())
